name: Zu Mao (Darong)
page_title: Zu Mao (Darong) 祖茂 (大榮) [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Zu Mao isn’t killed by Hua Xiong, but actually escapes the pursuit, which was actually led by Xu Rong.
	The ‘Magnificent Five of Wu’ is a fan creation with no historical basis. Zu Mao was not a part of any such group.

full_text:
Zu Mao (Darong) 祖茂 (大榮)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zu Mao (祖茂), styledDarong (大榮). One of Sun Jian’s first four commanders. Tricked Hua Xiong in order to save Sun Jian’s life. Zu Mao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Zu Mao isn’t killed by Hua Xiong, but actually escapes the pursuit, which was actually led by Xu Rong.
The ‘Magnificent Five of Wu’ is a fan creation with no historical basis. Zu Mao was not a part of any such group.
